arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta gives Bukayo Saka Arsenal injury update after Ipswich Town clash amid PSG fear
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta has confirmed the injury status of Bukayo Saka after he was substituted in the victory over Ipswich Town. In midweek, Arsenal advanced to the semi-finals of the Champions League after beating Real Madrid 2-1 on the night and 5-1 on aggregate.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta drops Arsenal vs PSG starting XI hint as Thomas Partey ban forces two changes
arts.sum: Arteta dropped Partey from the starting line-up in Arsenal's 4-0 win over Ipswich Town on Sunday afternoon, pushing Mikel Merino back into midfield and shifting Leandro Trossard into the frontline . Speaking to reporters after the game, Arteta was asked about Trossard's new role and whether he's ready to start against PSG.

arts.ttl: What Myles Lewis-Skelly did right after Arsenal's 4-0 win vs Ipswich Town that shows he's a class act
arts.sum: MLS has a heart of gold ❤️

arts.ttl: Arsenal 'OBSESSED' with €80m Nico Williams teammate as prolific Odegaard alternative
arts.sum: But, according to Spanish outlet El Nacional, Arsenal are not hoping to stop their raid of Bilbao at just Williams, with Arteta also now looking at attacking midfielder Oihan Sancet as an ‘absolute priority’. Sancet’s league tally this season would put him six goals ahead of Arsenal’s top scorer and, while the Gunners are expected to sign a number nine this summer, the Bilbao man would be a proven option to provide an outlet from midfield in tight games.

arts.ttl: Arsenal and Chelsea alerted to Kevin de Bruyne transfer admission as Man City star speaks out
arts.sum: "I still feel like I can play at a good level, but after I'll have to make a decision once I really know a little bit more." Kevin de Bruyne has opened up on his impending departure from Manchester City as Arsenal and Chelsea watch on.

arts.ttl: William Saliba names 'childhood dream' club as Arsenal star sends Real Madrid transfer message
arts.sum: The 24-year-old defender has been linked with a move to Santiago Bernabeu on numerous occasions in the past few months as he continues to impress for Arsenal. Speaking to reporters ahead of the Gunners' clash against PSV Eindhoven in the UEFA Champions League earlier this season, Saliba said: "I’m really happy here.

arts.ttl: Arsenal ease past 10-man Ipswich to delay Liverpool title
arts.sum: Leandro Trossard's double helped Arsenal cruise to a dominant 4-0 win over 10-man Ipswich Town at Portman Road, a result which postponed Liverpool's Premier League title celebrations. Mikel Merino nearly added a second goal soon after, glancing a header from a corner just over, but the Spaniard turned provider in the 28th minute with a sumptuous backheel flick to set up Martinelli to double Arsenal’s advantage.

arts.ttl: Arsenal 'eye-up' big money move for player who could put an end to their Champions League hopes
arts.sum: But now the latest rumours have suggested he could be on the move again, this time to London as Mikel Arteta wants to inject some new flair into the Arsenal attack. As the summer transfer window quickly approaches Arsenal have been linked with a move for some big names, with the latest reports suggesting they could be ready to splash the cash for Paris Saint Germain winger Ousmane Dembele.

arts.ttl: What Leandro Trossard said about Liverpool and the title race after Arsenal beat Ipswich 4-0
arts.sum: Liverpool could have won the Premier League title with their 1-0 victory over Leicester on Sunday, but Arsenal and Leandro Trossard had something to say...

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta might have just given away a big PSG selection hint with what Arsenal did vs Ipswich - opinion
